nasb.text: So Hiram came out from Tyre to see the cities which Solomon had given him, and they did not please him.

esv.text: But when Hiram came from Tyre to see the cities that Solomon had given him, they did not please him.

cnv.text: 希蘭從推羅出來，看看所羅門給他的這些城。他不喜歡這些城，

ccb.text: 希兰从泰尔去视察这些城，然后满心不悦地对所罗门说：
